project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo) with NestJS backend and Next.js frontend
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. Run commands from repo root with PATH=/root/.local/share/mise/shims:$PATH
test_framework: Vitest (web), Jest (backend, shared). Web uses @testing-library/react with jsdom. Config at packages/web/vitest.config.ts
build_command: export PATH=/root/.local/share/mise/shims:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-tripflow && pnpm run build
test_command: export PATH=/root/.local/share/mise/shims:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-tripflow && pnpm run test
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm run build from repo root. 2. Run pnpm run test from repo root. 3. Verify no TypeScript errors.
setup_instructions: export PATH=/root/.local/share/mise/shims:$PATH (node 22 + pnpm 10 available via mise). node_modules already installed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs. Use only pre-installed packages in node_modules. mise shims path required for node/pnpm.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns Next.js may differ from training data. No Next.js docs directory found at node_modules/next/dist/docs/ (mentioned path does not exist).
key_patterns: Backend uses NestJS + TypeORM + better-sqlite3. Frontend uses Next.js 14 App Router, client components with 'use client'. API client at packages/web/src/lib/api-client.ts uses relative /api base URL. Shared package exports Zod schemas and TypeScript types. Vercel deployment via packages/web/vercel.json.
directory_structure: Root: pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, tsconfig.base.json. packages/shared/src/ has schemas/ and types/. packages/backend/src/ has trips/, itinerary/, budget/, sync/, ai/ modules. packages/web/src/ has app/ (pages), lib/ (api-client, offline-queue, sync-manager), components/, __tests__/.
